batch_summary: In the living room, Rachel offers homemade brownies to the group, but Phoebe hurts her tooth upon biting one. When Ross and Chandler urge her to see a dentist, Phoebe refuses, explaining her bizarre belief that someone dies every time she visits one. Despite Ross's attempts to dismiss this as a mere coincidence, Phoebe remains terrified. Later at Central Perk, Phoebe's tooth pain persists when she tries to eat an apple, highlighting her ongoing dilemma.
cumulative_summary: The story begins in a cozy living room where Rachel offers homemade brownies to Chandler, Ross, and Phoebe. Upon taking a bite, Phoebe immediately experiences sharp tooth pain. Although Ross and Chandler encourage her to see a dentist, Phoebe adamantly refuses due to a bizarre superstition: she firmly believes that every time she goes to the dentist, someone close to her dies, citing her Aunt Mary, her mailman, and a cowboy friend as past victims. Despite Ross's logical arguments that these deaths are merely coincidences, Phoebe remains convinced and claims she only flosses to save lives. Later, at the Central Perk coffee shop, Rachel and Ross chat near the counter while Phoebe attempts to eat an apple. However, she is quickly reminded of her dental issues when another bite causes her agonizing pain, leaving her stuck between her fear of the dentist and her worsening toothache.

batch_summary: Rachel finally convinces Phoebe to go to the dentist, though Phoebe remains terrified that her visit will cause someone's death. Meanwhile, Joey reveals to Monica and Ross that he saw Chandler's girlfriend, Janice, kissing her ex-husband. Ross insists Joey must tell Chandler, despite Joey's reluctance. Later, as Phoebe frantically warns her friends to stay safe before her appointment, Ross asks Monica to babysit his son Ben, prompting an offended Rachel to ask why she wasn't trusted with the task.
cumulative_summary: The story begins with Phoebe experiencing agonizing tooth pain, yet refusing to see a dentist due to her superstitious belief that her visits cause the deaths of those close to her. Eventually, Rachel manages to convince a terrified Phoebe to schedule an appointment, though Phoebe frantically warns her friends to avoid any fatal accidents in her absence. Meanwhile, a new conflict arises when Joey reveals to Monica and Ross that he caught Chandler's girlfriend, Janice, kissing her ex-husband. While Ross insists that Joey must break the devastating news to Chandler, Joey is highly reluctant to do so. Later, Ross arrives looking for a babysitter for his son, Ben, after a museum display is vandalized. When Monica volunteers, Rachel feels slighted and questions why Ross did not trust her with the responsibility of watching his son.

batch_summary: Ross leaves his son, Ben, in the care of Monica and Rachel. While babysitting, Rachel struggles to entertain Ben, prompting Monica to take over and play the "airplane game." Accidentally, Monica swings Ben's head into a wooden beam, causing a bump. Panicked, the two women desperately try to cover up the accident, agreeing to hide the injury from Ross. Monica frantically plans a distraction for when Ross returns to prevent him from discovering the bump.
